descriptions.text: Gather up all of your best friends for the first SNES homebrew game by RetroZone, Christmas Craze, written by Shiru. Dodge aliens and grab gifts or fight your friends with snowballs in two player present picking battles. While everyone is drunk on egg nog trip out to the colorful blinky lights that surround the edge of the cart! When you gather presents in the game the lights dance with the sound effects.
